positive: A stylized, intricate symmetrical mandala design featuring interconnected cosmic elements. The primary subject is a stylized crescent moon cradling a constellation pattern of luminous stars and mythical flora, such as bioluminescent lilies and swirling nebula patterns. Incorporate geometric sacred geometry shapes (triangles, hexagons) seamlessly integrating with organic, flowing curves. Use a color palette of deep indigo, celestial sapphire, shimmering gold leaf accents, and iridescent violet, set against a clean white background. The style should be hyper-detailed, Art Nouveau meets psychedelic geometry, suitable for a central, high-contrast print on fabric. Excellent negative space and strong black outlines.
